title: Pentaceras australe
intro: Pentaceras australe, also known as the 'Aussie Boxwood', is a species of flowering plant in the family Rutaceae. The health benefits of this plant include its potential anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant properties, which may be useful in treating various health conditions such as wounds, infections, and oxidative stress. The bioactive constituents of Pentaceras australe include limonoids, flavonoids, and terpenoids, which are responsible for its medicinal properties. In traditional herbal medicine, Pentaceras australe is often used to make teas, infusions, and extracts, which are used to treat various health issues, including fever, cough, and digestive problems.
